reasoning: The control requires monitoring and maintaining environmental protections, software, and recovery infrastructure. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring audit logging is enabled to monitor activities, configuring etcd backups for data recovery, enabling encryption at rest for secrets to protect data, and enforcing pod security standards to maintain a secure runtime environment.
title: A1.2 The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections, software, data back-up processes, and recovery infrastructure to meet its objectives
